title: Union Bank Board To Meet Over 2020 Third Quarter Financial Statements
description: The board of director of Union Bank of Nigeria Plc, will be meeting on Monday 26th, October, 2020, to approve the unaudited financial statements for the nine months ended 30th September 2020. Accordin
html:
The board of director of Union Bank of Nigeria Plc, will be meeting on Monday 26th, October, 2020, to approve the unaudited financial statements for the nine months ended 30th September 2020.

According to a statement from the Company Secretary Somuyiwa Sonubi, its in compliance with the Nigerian Stock Exchange (NSE) rule book and the amendments to the listing rules.

The statement added “Consequently, there will be a closed period in respect of which no insider of Union Bank of Nigeria Plc may buy and or sell shares of the Bank from 11th October 2020 to twenty four (24) hours after the filing of the Unaudited Financial Statements with The Exchange”.
